summary: COMPARISON two NumberPlanes. LEFT GREEN (C, +) plane with YELLOW z=a+bi dot and GREEN arrow from origin. RIGHT ORANGE (C^*, ×) plane with RED e^z dot, RED arrow from origin, and BLUE semi-transparent always_redraw Circle of radius e^a showing the modulus. ValueTracker a_tr, b_tr independently sweep (0.8, π/2, π) so real-part adds stretch the image out of the unit circle while imaginary-part adds rotate it. Bottom readout shows live a, b, |e^z|. This visualizes exp as the group homomorphism (C,+)→(C^*,×): add -> dilate+rotate.
